title: Platyopuntia vulgaris
taxonomy: Platyopuntia vulgaris is classified as a member of the family Cactaceae and is a species of cactus native to certain regions. It belongs to the genus Platyopuntia, which is a group of cacti characterized by their flat stems. The classification of Platyopuntia vulgaris can also be broken down further into the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. Within the Cactaceae family, Platyopuntia vulgaris is often grouped with other species that share similar characteristics. The precise classification of this species may vary depending on the taxonomic system being used.
